description: Implement a Wazuh detection rule (ID 100150, level 12) in `/var/ossec/etc/rules/local_rules.xml` that triggers when a process execution path starts with `/tmp` or `/var/tmp`, using the log format provided in `/root/audit_sample.log`. Configure the Wazuh manager in `/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf` to monitor `/root/replay.log` and verify that an alert is generated in `/var/ossec/logs/alerts/alerts.json` when the sample activity is processed.
